hero.name: Ahmed Mostafa
hero.summary: Impact-driven Senior Frontend Developer specializing in the React.js and Next.js ecosystem. Proven track record of architecting scalable enterprise applications, optimizing web performance, and mentoring engineering teams.

techStack.title: Tech Stack & Tools
techStack.subtitle: Technologies I use to bring ideas to life

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: My career journey and key achievements

guestna.title: Senior Frontend Developer
bullets: Architected an enterprise-grade migration to Next.js 14 (App Router) with PWA support, achieving a 35% improvement in Lighthouse performance scores and full offline usability.
Engineered an efficient data synchronization and caching layer for B2B and B2C portals, reducing redundant API queries by 40% through TanStack Query alongside Redux Persist.
Spearheaded a fully localized, multilingual platform (EN/AR) with comprehensive RTL support, increasing user acquisition in regional GCC markets by 25%.
Optimized marketing tracking and SEO by integrating GA4, GTM, and Geolocation-based routing, boosting organic traffic by 30%.
Secured application boundaries against XSS attacks, achieving strict PCI compliance via Next.js proxy route handlers and CSP middleware for Apple Pay integrations.
Enhanced production observability, decreasing MTTR of critical UI anomalies by 45% through end-to-end Sentry tracing and automated sourcemap uploads.

arabiaIt.title: Frontend Developer
bullets: Developed the governmental "Saea App" for the Ministry of Endowments, accelerating administrative workflows by 30% with Next.js and secure REST API integrations.
Streamlined governmental data collection, reducing user input errors by 25% through a reusable UI component library with robust validation using Formik and Yup.
Improved cross-device usability and layout stability, decreasing UI-related bug reports by 40% through rigorous debugging and fluid responsive design.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of recent work I'm proud of

waratel.title: Waratel LMS
waratel.description: A comprehensive Learning Management System with multi-role architecture for Students, Teachers, and Parents. Premium glassmorphic UI with dark mode, automated Arabic/English switching, GA4 analytics, and real-time push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging.

quran.title: Daily Quran Examination
quran.description: A Progressive Web App for daily Quran examinations with custom state hooks, secure authentication flows, decoupled theme resolvers to eliminate UI flickering, and advanced LTR/RTL support.

tastyFood.title: Tasty Food
tastyFood.description: A comprehensive multi-page application with dynamic English/Arabic language toggling, system-wide dark mode, advanced product filtering, and a reusable component architecture.

atomica.title: Atomica (Figma Plugin)
atomica.description: Custom color system generator with AI-driven palette generation, custom-named color collections, and seamless one-click export of styles, variables, and JSON files for developer handoff.

foodly.title: Foodly (E-Commerce)
foodly.description: Extensive 14-page custom web application built from scratch with Landing, About, Cart, Checkout, Shop, Menu, Testimonials, Contact, and FAQ pages with responsive layouts.
